full_text:
Jiang Ban и”ЈзҸӯ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Ban (и”ЈзҸӯ). Advised Zhuge Dan to force a battle to escape but was rejected. Surrendered to Wei. Jiang Ban was affiliated with Zhuge Dan and the Wei Kingdom.
